### 2141135
**Care Bears: Unlock the Magic S01E26 - Share Your Care**  
đź†• TV-Y7 đź”“ 11:01  
âŚ› June 24, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=10000000000&titleid=2141135&mediaid=49cbc904938dc4169e0207518bf19e9c2a7f4dd8) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/care-bears-unlock-the-magic/share-your-care-episode.html  
seriesid=`2141109` titleid=`2141135` mediaid=`49cbc904938dc4169e0207518bf19e9c2a7f4dd8`  
_Dibble plants the seeds of a strange bush outside of its natural environment, unaware that she has unleashed a disaster: The plant multiplies and begins to quickly spread. The Bears must find a way to stop its greedy growth before it crowds out all the other plants in the Silver Lining._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141135_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141135_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141135_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141135_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141135_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141135_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141135_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141135_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141135_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141135_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141135_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141135_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141135_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141135_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141135_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141135_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141135_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141135_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141135_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141135_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>
